sharc
Documentation développeur
DivKGradGScheme.h
1 // -*- C++ -*-
2 #ifndef DIVKGRADGSCHEME_H
3 #define DIVKGRADGSCHEME_H
4 
5 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
6 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>
7 #include <arcane/IMeshSubMeshTransition.h>
8 #include <arcane/VariableTypedef.h>
9 #include <boost/shared_ptr.hpp>
10 
11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/CoefficientArrayBuilder.h"
12 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/Comparator.h"
13 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/IDivKGradOLGSchemes.h"
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/DivKGradOLGSchemesImpl/DivKGradLSchemeStencils.h"
15 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Utils/Algorithms/LUSolver.h"
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Utils/lapackUtils.h"
17 
18 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 
20 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
21  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
22 class DivKGradGScheme
23  : public IDivKGradOLGSchemes<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
24  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
25 {
26 public:
27  typedef IDivKGradOLGSchemes<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
28  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder> BaseClass;
29 
30  typedef DivKGradGScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
31  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder> ThisClass;
32 
33  typedef TCellStencilBuilder CellStencilBuilderType;
34  typedef TFaceStencilBuilder FaceStencilBuilderType;
35  typedef TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder CellCoefficientArrayBuilderType;
36  typedef TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder FaceCoefficientArrayBuilderType;
37 
38 protected:
39  friend struct OperatorImplementationT<OperatorImplementationTraitsT<ThisClass>::type>;
40 
41  OperatorImplementationT<OperatorImplementationTraitsT<ThisClass>::type> m_implementation;
42 
43  typedef OperatorImplementationT<OperatorImplementationTraitsT<ThisClass>::type> ImplementationType;
44  typedef typename ImplementationType::ComparatorType ComparatorType;
45 
46 private:
47  typedef typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder::Initializer CellCoefficientArrayInitializer;
48  typedef typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder::Initializer FaceCoefficientArrayInitializer;
49 
50  typedef typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder::Inserter CellCoefficientArrayInserter;
51  typedef typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder::Inserter FaceCoefficientArrayInserter;
52 
53  typedef typename BaseClass::CellNum CellNum;
54  typedef typename BaseClass::FaceNum FaceNum;
55  typedef typename BaseClass::FaceNumByCell FaceNumByCell;
56 
57 public:
58  DivKGradGScheme(ITraceMng * a_trace_mng)
59  : m_trace_mng(a_trace_mng)
60  {
61  // do nothing
62  }
63 
65  template<Integer N, typename VariableTypeT>
66  void formDiscreteOperatorT(const VariableTypeT & kappa);
67 
68 private:
69  boost::shared_ptr<CellCoefficientArrayInitializer> m_cell_ca_initializer;
70  boost::shared_ptr<FaceCoefficientArrayInitializer> m_face_ca_initializer;
71 
72  boost::shared_ptr<CellCoefficientArrayInserter> m_cell_ca_inserter;
73  boost::shared_ptr<FaceCoefficientArrayInserter> m_face_ca_inserter;
74 
75  boost::shared_ptr<ComparatorType> m_degeneration1_comparator;
76  boost::shared_ptr<ComparatorType> m_degeneration2_comparator;
77 
78  ITraceMng * m_trace_mng;
79 
80  // Compute discrete operator. N is the space dimension
81  template<Integer N,
82  typename VariableTypeT, typename CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
83  typename Degeneration1Comparator, typename Degeneration2Comparator>
84  void _compute_discrete_operator(const VariableTypeT & kappa,
85  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder & cell_ca_builder,
86  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder & face_ca_builder,
87  Degeneration1Comparator & degeneration1_comparator,
88  Degeneration2Comparator & degeneration2_comparator);
89 
90  template<typename VariableTypeT>
91  Real _compute_trans_centered_stencil(const Node& node, CellNum & NumLocCell,
92  const VariableTypeT& kappa,
93  L_Stencil& centered_stencil);
94 
95  Real _coercivity(Real x, Real eps = 0.1, Real n = 1.);
96 };
97 
98 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
99 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
100 
101 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
102  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
103 template<Integer N, typename VariableTypeT>
104 void DivKGradGScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
105  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
106 formDiscreteOperatorT(const VariableTypeT & kappa)
107 {
108 
109  ImplementationType::template apply<N, ThisClass, VariableTypeT>(this, kappa);
110  this->m_status |= DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_FORMED;
111 }
112 
113 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
114 
115 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
116  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
117 template<Integer N,
118  typename VariableTypeT,
119  typename CellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder,
120  typename Degeneration1Comparator, typename Degeneration2Comparator>
121 void DivKGradGScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
122  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
123 _compute_discrete_operator(const VariableTypeT & kappa,
124  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder & cell_ca_builder,
125  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder & face_ca_builder,
126  Degeneration1Comparator & degeneration1_comparator,
127  Degeneration2Comparator & degeneration2_comparator)
128 {
129  ARCANE_ASSERT( (this->m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
130  ("Operator not prepared") );
131 
132  // Retrieve geometric properties
133  this->m_f_centers = &this->m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(this->m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
134  this->m_f_normals = &this->m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(this->m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
135  this->m_f_measures = &this->m_geometry_service->getRealVariableProperty(this->m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
136  this->m_c_centers = &this->m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(this->m_cells, IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
137 
138  Integer MaxFaceId = this->m_internal_faces.mesh()->faceFamily()->maxLocalId();
139 
140  // Internal nodes
141  SharedArray<Real> weight_normalize(MaxFaceId);
142  SharedArray<Integer> non_boun_nodes(MaxFaceId);
143  weight_normalize.fill(0.);
144  non_boun_nodes.fill(0);
145  VariableNodeReal3 coords = PRIMARYMESH_CAST(this->m_internal_faces.mesh())->nodesCoordinates();
146 
147  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode, this->m_internal_nodes) {
148  const Node& node = *inode;
149  //Allocation du vecteur
150  FaceNumByCell NumLocfacesbyCell;
151  NumLocfacesbyCell.resize(node.nbCell());
152 
153  this->_compute_local_connectivity(node, *(this->m_cell_numbering),NumLocfacesbyCell);
154 
155  //Calculate the number of stencils
156  Integer NumStencils = 0;
157  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < node.nbCell() ; i++) {
158  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[i].size() == 3) {
159  NumStencils ++;
160  }
161  else{
162  NumStencils += 4;
163  }
164  }
165 
166  //Initialize the centered stencils
167  L_Stencil **centered_stencils;
168  centered_stencils = new L_Stencil*[NumStencils];
169  //Compute the transmissibilities
170  SharedArray<Real> weight(NumStencils);
171  Integer ist = 0;
172  for (Integer icell=0 ; icell<node.nbCell() ; ++icell) {
173  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[icell].size() == 3) {
174  centered_stencils[ist] = new L_Stencil(node, icell, *(this->m_cell_numbering), NumLocfacesbyCell);
175  weight[ist] = _compute_trans_centered_stencil<VariableTypeT>(node, *(this->m_cell_numbering), kappa, *centered_stencils[ist]);
176  ist++;
177  }
178  else{ // Case of pyramid vertex
179  for (Integer iface = 0 ; iface < 4 ; iface++) {
180  centered_stencils[ist] = new L_Stencil(node, icell, iface, *(this->m_cell_numbering), NumLocfacesbyCell);
181  weight[ist] = _compute_trans_centered_stencil<VariableTypeT>(node, *(this->m_cell_numbering), kappa, *centered_stencils[ist]);
182  ist++;
183  }
184  }
185  }
186 
187  // Calculate the non-boundary nodes for each face
188  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < node.nbFace(); iface++) {
189  const Face & face = node.face(iface);
190  non_boun_nodes[face.localId()]++;
191  }
192 
193  for (Integer stencil_num=0 ; stencil_num < NumStencils ; ++stencil_num) { //loop over the stencils
194  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < 3 ; iface++) {
195  Integer locnbface = centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getFace(iface);
196  const Face & face = node.face(locnbface);
197  weight_normalize[face.localId()] += weight[stencil_num];
198  for (Integer icell = 0; icell < 4 ; icell++) {
199  cell_ca_builder.subtract(face,
200  node.cell(centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getCell(icell)),
201  centered_stencils[stencil_num]->transm[iface][icell]);
202  }
203  }
204  }
205  for (Integer ist = 0 ; ist < NumStencils; ist++)
206  delete centered_stencils[ist];
207  delete[] centered_stencils;
208  }
209 
210  if (this->m_type != TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_Gscheme) {
211  // Get the proper coefficients
212  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, this->m_internal_faces) {
213  const Face & F = *iface;
214  Integer nbnodes = F.nbNode();
215  if (weight_normalize[F.localId()]==0.) {
216  m_trace_mng->fatal()<<" No non-degenerate stencils found inside of the domain (case of non-G b.c.) for face #"<<F.localId();
217  }
218  if (non_boun_nodes[F.localId()])
219  weight_normalize[F.localId()] = non_boun_nodes[F.localId()]/(weight_normalize[F.localId()]*nbnodes);
220  else
221  weight_normalize[F.localId()] = 1.;
222  }
223 
224  // Normalization of transmissibilities
225  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, this->m_internal_faces) {
226  const Face & F = *iface;
227  ItemVectorView c_stencilF = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencil(F);
228  Integer c_st_size = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencilSize(F);
229  for (Integer i = 0; i < c_st_size ; i++) {
230  const Cell & cell = c_stencilF[i].toCell();
231  cell_ca_builder.multiply(F, cell, weight_normalize[F.localId()]);
232  }
233  }
234  }
235 
236 
237  // Boundary nodes
238  switch(this->m_type) {
239  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_Gscheme : {
240  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode, this->m_boundary_nodes) {
241  const Node& node = *inode;
242  //Allocation du vecteur
243  FaceNumByCell NumLocfacesbyCell;
244  NumLocfacesbyCell.resize(node.nbCell());
245  this->_compute_local_connectivity(node, *(this->m_cell_numbering),NumLocfacesbyCell);
246 
247  //Calculate the number of stencils
248  Integer NumStencils = 0;
249  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < node.nbCell() ; i++) {
250  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[i].size() == 3) {
251  NumStencils ++;
252  }
253  else{
254  NumStencils += 4;
255  }
256  }
257 
258  //Initialize the centered stencils
259  L_Stencil **centered_stencils;
260  centered_stencils = new L_Stencil*[NumStencils];
261 
262  //Compute the transmissibilities
263  SharedArray<Real> weight(NumStencils);
264  Integer ist = 0;
265  for (Integer icell=0 ; icell < node.nbCell() ; ++icell) {
266  if (NumLocfacesbyCell[icell].size() == 3) {
267  centered_stencils[ist] = new L_Stencil(node, icell, *(this->m_cell_numbering), NumLocfacesbyCell);
268  weight[ist] = _compute_trans_centered_stencil<VariableTypeT>(node, *(this->m_cell_numbering), kappa, *centered_stencils[ist]);
269  ist++;
270  }
271  else{ // Case of pyramid vertex
272  for (Integer iface = 0 ; iface < 4 ; iface++) {
273  centered_stencils[ist] = new L_Stencil(node, icell, iface, *(this->m_cell_numbering), NumLocfacesbyCell);
274  weight[ist] = _compute_trans_centered_stencil<VariableTypeT>(node, *(this->m_cell_numbering), kappa, *centered_stencils[ist]);
275  ist++;
276  }
277  }
278  }
279 
280  //Retrieve the transmissibilities
281  for (Integer stencil_num = 0 ; stencil_num < NumStencils ; ++stencil_num) { //loop over the stencils
282  for (Integer iface = 0; iface < 3 ; iface++) {
283  Integer locnbface = centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getFace(iface);
284  const Face & face = node.face(locnbface);
285  weight_normalize[face.localId()] += weight[stencil_num];
286  for (Integer icell = 0; icell < 4; icell++) {
287  Integer num_cell = centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getCell(icell);
288  if (num_cell == -1) { //boundary face
289  face_ca_builder.subtract(face,
290  node.face(centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getFace(icell-1)),
291  centered_stencils[stencil_num]->transm[iface][icell]);
292  }
293  else{
294  cell_ca_builder.subtract(face,
295  node.cell(centered_stencils[stencil_num]->getCell(icell)),
296  centered_stencils[stencil_num]->transm[iface][icell]);
297  }
298  }
299  }
300  }
301  for (Integer ist = 0 ; ist < NumStencils; ist++)
302  delete centered_stencils[ist];
303  delete[] centered_stencils;
304  }
305 
306  // Invert the weighting coefficients
307  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, this->m_faces) {
308  const Face & F = *iface;
309  if (weight_normalize[F.localId()]!=0.)
310  weight_normalize[F.localId()] = 1./weight_normalize[F.localId()];
311  else
312  m_trace_mng->fatal()<<" No non-degenerate stencils found for face #"<<F.localId();
313  }
314 
315  // Normalization of transmissibilities
316  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, this->m_faces) {
317  const Face & F = *iface;
318  ItemVectorView c_stencilF = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencil(F);
319  Integer c_st_size = this->m_cell_coefficients->stencilSize(F);
320  for (Integer i = 0; i < c_st_size ; i++) {
321  const Cell & cell = c_stencilF[i].toCell();
322  cell_ca_builder.multiply(F, cell, weight_normalize[F.localId()]);
323  }
324  Integer f_st_size = this->m_face_coefficients->stencilSize(F);
325  if (f_st_size) {
326  ItemVectorView f_stencilF = this->m_face_coefficients->stencil(F);
327  for (Integer i = 0; i < f_st_size ; i++) {
328  const Face & face = f_stencilF[i].toFace();
329  face_ca_builder.multiply(F, face, weight_normalize[F.localId()]);
330  }
331  }
332  }
333  break;
334  }
335  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_TwoPoints : {// schema deux points pour les noeuds de bord
336  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode, this->m_boundary_nodes) {
337  const Node& node = *inode;
338  this->BaseClass::template _compute_two_point_boundary_conditions<VariableTypeT,
339  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder,
340  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>(node, kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder);
341  }
342  break;
343  }
344  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_StandardTwoPoints : {// schema deux points pour les noeuds de bord
345  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode, this->m_boundary_nodes) {
346  const Node& node = *inode;
347  this->BaseClass::template _compute_standard_two_point_boundary_conditions<VariableTypeT,
348  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder,
349  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>(node, kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder);
350  }
351  break;
352  }
353  case TypesDivKGradOLGSchemes::BC_Oscheme : {// O-Schema pour les noeuds de bord
354  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode, this->m_boundary_nodes) {
355  const Node& node = *inode;
356  //Allocation du vecteur
357  FaceNumByCell NumLocfacesbyCell;
358  NumLocfacesbyCell.resize(node.nbCell());
359  // Pour chaque maille autour du noeud, on calcule Lambda Gradient
360  SharedArray2<Real3> Gradient(node.nbCell(),node.nbFace()+1);
361  this->_compute_local_connectivity(node, *(this->m_cell_numbering),NumLocfacesbyCell);
362  try{
363  TrueComparatorT<bool> true_comparator;
364  this->BaseClass::template
365  _compute_cell_gradient<3, TrueComparatorT<bool> >
366  (node, NumLocfacesbyCell, Gradient, true_comparator) ;
367  this->BaseClass::template _compute_o_scheme_boundary_conditions<VariableTypeT,
368  CellCoefficientArrayBuilder,
369  FaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>(node,
370  *(this->m_cell_numbering), NumLocfacesbyCell, Gradient,
371  kappa, cell_ca_builder, face_ca_builder);
372  }
373  catch (typename BaseClass::Error e) {
374  m_trace_mng->fatal() << e.msg;
375  }
376  }
377  break;
378  }
379  default:
380  m_trace_mng->error() << "Unknown boundary condition type";
381  }
382 }
383 
384 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
385 
386 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
387  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
388 template<typename VariableTypeT>
389 Real DivKGradGScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
390  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
391 _compute_trans_centered_stencil(const Node& node, CellNum & NumLocCell,
392  const VariableTypeT & kappa,
393  L_Stencil& centered_stencil)
394 {
395  typedef typename VariableTraitsT<VariableTypeT>::DataType DiffusionType;
396 
397  const Integer N = 3;
398  LUSolver<Real>::matrix_type A(N,N);
399  LUSolver<Real>::matrix_type B(N,N+1);
400  A.clear();
401  B.clear();
402 
403  const Cell & K = node.cell(centered_stencil.getCell(0));
404  const DiffusionType& LambdaK = kappa[K];
405  Real3 xK = (*this->m_c_centers)[K];
406 
407  // Generate the system for the gradient recovery on the central cell
408  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < N ; i++) {
409  const Face & face = node.face(centered_stencil.getFace(i));
410  //internal face
411  if (!face.isSubDomainBoundary()) {
412  const Cell& L = node.cell(centered_stencil.getCell(i+1));
413  const DiffusionType& LambdaL = kappa[L];
414  Real3 xL = (*this->m_c_centers)[L];
415  Real3 xKL = xL - xK;
416  Real3 normalK, normalL;
417  //get the unit normals
418  if (face.backCell() == K) {
419  normalK = (*this->m_f_normals)[face]/(*this->m_f_measures)[face];
420  normalL = -normalK;
421  }
422  else{
423  normalL = (*this->m_f_normals)[face]/(*this->m_f_measures)[face];
424  normalK = -normalL;
425  }
426  Real3 Lam_Kn_K = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(LambdaK,normalK);
427  Real3 Lam_Ln_L = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(LambdaL,normalL);
428  Real d_L_sigma = math::abs(math::scaMul(xKL, normalK));
429  Real k = math::scaMul(Lam_Ln_L, normalL)/d_L_sigma;
430  Real3 row = k*xKL + Lam_Kn_K + Lam_Ln_L;
431  A(i,0) = row.x;
432  A(i,1) = row.y;
433  A(i,2) = row.z;
434  B(i,i+1) = k;
435  B(i,0) = -k;
436  }
437  // boundary face
438  else{
439  Real3 x_sigma = (*this->m_f_centers)[face];
440  Real3 row= x_sigma - xK;
441  A(i,0) = row.x;
442  A(i,1) = row.y;
443  A(i,2) = row.z;
444  B(i,i+1) = 1.;
445  B(i,0) = -1.;
446  }
447  }
448 
449  // Find the gradient
450  LUSolver<Real>::matrix_type Grad(3,4);
451  LUSolver<Real> lu;
452  try {
453  lu.factor(A);
454  Grad = lu.solve(B); //Grad=A^{-1}B
455  }
456  catch(LUSolver<Real>::Error e) { //Exceptional case when the matrix is singular
457  m_trace_mng->fatal() << e.msg;
458  }
459  // Check if the matrix is very close to singular
460  Real det = lu.det();
461  Real Max = 0.;
462  for (std::size_t i = 0 ; i < A.size1() ; i++) {
463  for (std::size_t j = 0 ; j < A.size2() ; j++) {
464  Max = math::max(Max,math::abs(A(i,j)));
465  }
466  }
467  //Scale the determinant
468  det /= Max;
469  if (math::abs(det)<1e-8) {
470  return 0.;
471  }
472 
473  // Compute Lambda*gradient
474  SharedArray<Real3> LambdaGradient(4);
475  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < 4 ; i++) {
476  Real3 column;
477  column.x = Grad(0,i);
478  column.y = Grad(1,i);
479  column.z = Grad(2,i);
480  LambdaGradient[i] = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(LambdaK,column);
481  }
482 
483  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < N ; i++) {
484  const Face & face = node.face(centered_stencil.getFace(i));
485  Real3 normal = (*this->m_f_normals)[face];
486  if (face.isSubDomainBoundary() && !face.isSubDomainBoundaryOutside())
487  normal = -normal;
488  for (Integer j = 0 ; j < 4 ; j++) {
489  centered_stencil.transm[i][j] = math::scaMul(LambdaGradient[j], normal);
490  }
491  }
492 
493  // Compute the weighting coefficient
494  SharedArray<Real> dKL(N);
495  for (Integer i = 0; i < N ; i++) {
496  Integer icell =centered_stencil.getCell(i+1);
497  Integer iface = centered_stencil.getFace(i);
498  const Face & face = node.face(iface);
499  Real3 xL;
500  if (icell == -1)
501  xL = (*this->m_f_centers)[face];
502  else
503  xL = (*this->m_c_centers)[node.cell(icell)];
504  Real3 xKL = xL - xK;
505  Real3 normal = (*this->m_f_normals)[face];
506  dKL[i] = math::abs(math::scaMul(xKL,normal));
507  }
508 
509  SharedArray<Real> d_m(N);
510  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < N ; i++)
511  d_m[i] = math::sqrt(dKL[i])/(*this->m_f_measures)[node.face(centered_stencil.getFace(i))];
512 
513  // begin the version for Xsyev
514  double A2[N*N];
515  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < N ; i++) {
516  Integer nline = i * N;
517  for (Integer j = i ; j < N ; j++)
518  A2[nline + j] = 0.5*(centered_stencil.transm[i][j+1]+centered_stencil.transm[j][i+1])*d_m[i]*d_m[j];
519  for (Integer j = 0 ; j < i ; j++)
520  A2[nline + j] = A2[j * N + i] ;
521  }
522 
523  char JOBS = 'N';
524  char UPLO = 'U';
525  const int dim = N;
526  double Eigens[dim];
527  const int lwork = 26*dim;
528  double work[lwork];
529  int INFO;
530  XSYEV<double>::apply(JOBS, UPLO, dim, A2, dim, Eigens, work, lwork, INFO);
531  // end the version for Xsyev
532 
533  Real weight = Eigens[0];
534  for (Integer i = 1 ; i < dim; i++) {
535  weight = math::min(weight, Eigens[i]);
536  }
537 
538  weight = _coercivity(weight);
539 
540  // Copy the transmissibilities to the containers
541  for (Integer i=0; i < N; i++)
542  for (Integer j=0 ; j < N+1; j++)
543  centered_stencil.transm[i][j] *= weight;
544 
545  return weight;
546 }
547 
548 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
549 
550 template<typename TCellStencilBuilder, typename TFaceStencilBuilder,
551  typename TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, typename TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>
552 Real DivKGradGScheme<TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder,
553  TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder>::
554 _coercivity(Real x,Real eps , Real n)
555 {
556  if(x < 0)
557  return (eps * eps /(eps - x));
558  else
559  return (pow(eps,1.0-n) * pow(x+eps,n)/n + (eps * (n-1))/n) ;
560 }
561 
562 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
563 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
564 
565 #endif
DivKGradGScheme
